about.name: Aditya Narayan
title: Aspiring DevOps Engineer
Cloud Enthusiast
Full Stack Developer
about.summary: Driven Computer Science student with a strong passion for DevOps and cloud technologies. Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree, I am eager to apply theoretical knowledge to practical projects. Possessing a strong foundation in programming and problem-solving, I am seeking opportunities to contribute to innovative tech solutions. Keen learner with a desire to excel in the dynamic world of cloud computing and automation.

education.school: Institute of Technical Education and Research, SOA

experience.role: EY GDS Winter Internship by AICTE
experience.description: Full Stack Web Development Internship for MEARN Stack. Developed a comprehensive web application using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js (MERN Stack) to track expenses efficiently with features such as user authentication, subscription plans, and data visualization.

DevOps Internship focused on Containerization and Orchestration. Gained hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes, learning to containerize applications and manage them in a clustered environment for improved scalability and reliability. Deployed microservices-based applications using Docker containers and orchestrated them with Kubernetes.
